name: team_memory_clear
description: Clear or manage team shared memory storage. Use this to remove outdated information, reset workflow state, clean up session data, or perform maintenance on team memory storage. Be careful as cleared data cannot be recovered. Team context is automatically inferred from the agent's team membership.

action.description: Type of clear operation - clear_context removes entire context, clear_path removes specific path, clear_filter removes matching entries, clear_all removes everything, compact optimizes storage

context.description: Memory context to clear (required for clear_context)

path.description: Specific JSON path to clear (required for clear_path, e.g., 'contexts.workflow.completed_steps')

filter.description: Filter criteria for selective clearing (required for clear_filter)
